languages.text: Jae looks really good with this implant!

traits.locale_text: Jae looks really good with this implant!

languages.text: Кто-то скажет, что глупо тратить сказочные богатства на обычный шейный имплант. Джай Хейдари возразит: носить обычный шейный имплант, будучи принцессой Ифрита, просто-напросто неприлично.
Some might say it is foolish to spend a fortune on a mere neck implant. Jae Heydari would counter that wearing a mere neck implant while being the Princess of Efreet is simply beneath her dignity.
languages.original_text: Кто-то скажет, что глупо тратить сказочные богатства на обычный шейный имплант. Джай Хейдари возразит: носить обычный шейный имплант, будучи принцессой Ифрита, просто-напросто неприлично.

traits.locale_text: Some might say it is foolish to spend a fortune on a mere neck implant. Jae Heydari would counter that wearing an ordinary neck implant while being the Princess of Efreet is simply beneath her dignity.

Some might say it is foolish to spend a fortune on a mere neck implant. Jae Heydari would counter that wearing an ordinary neck implant while being the Princess of Efreet is simply beneath her dignity.
Some might say it is foolish to spend a fortune on a mere neck implant. Jae Heydari would counter that wearing a mere neck implant while being the Princess of Efreet is simply beneath her dignity.
Some might say it is foolish to spend a fortune on a mere neck implant. Jae Heydari would counter that wearing a mere neck implant while being the Princess of Efreet is simply beneath her dignity.

languages.text: Es gibt Stimmen, die es für töricht halten, ein Vermögen in ein einfaches Halsimplantat zu investieren. Jae Heydari würde dem entgegensetzen, dass ein einfaches Halsimplantat schlicht unter der Würde der Prinzessin von Efreet wäre.
languages.original_text: Some might say it is foolish to spend a fortune on a mere neck implant. Jae Heydari would counter that wearing a mere neck implant while being the Princess of Efreet is simply beneath her dignity.

traits.locale_text: Es gibt Stimmen, die es für töricht halten, ein Vermögen in ein einfaches Halsimplantat zu investieren. Jae Heydari würde dem entgegensetzen, dass ein einfaches Halsimplantat schlicht unter der Würde der Prinzessin von Efreet wäre.

languages.text: D'aucuns considéreraient comme une folie de dépenser une fortune pour un simple implant cervical, mais aux yeux de Jae Heydari, un augmétique ordinaire serait indigne d'une princesse d'Éfrit.
languages.original_text: Some might say it is foolish to spend a fortune on a mere neck implant. Jae Heydari would counter that wearing a mere neck implant while being the Princess of Efreet is simply beneath her dignity.

traits.locale_text: D'aucuns considéreraient comme une folie de dépenser une fortune pour un simple implant cervical, mais aux yeux de Jae Heydari, un augmétique ordinaire serait indigne d'une princesse d'Éfrit.

languages.text: 有人可能会说，花费重金只为买个颈部植入物简直愚蠢。但婕伊·海达利会反驳：身为艾弗里特公主，若只佩戴区区一件寻常的颈部植入物，未免有失身份。
languages.original_text: Some might say it is foolish to spend a fortune on a mere neck implant. Jae Heydari would counter that wearing a mere neck implant while being the Princess of Efreet is simply beneath her dignity.

traits.locale_text: 有人可能会说，花费重金只为买个颈部植入物简直愚蠢。但婕伊·海达利会反驳：身为艾弗里特公主，若只佩戴区区一件寻常的颈部植入物，未免有失身份。

languages.text: Algunos dirían que es una insensatez gastarse una fortuna en un mero implante de cuello. Jae Heydari respondería que ninguna princesa de Efreet que se precie se dignaría a llevar un implante de cuello del montón.
languages.original_text: Some might say it is foolish to spend a fortune on a mere neck implant. Jae Heydari would counter that wearing a mere neck implant while being the Princess of Efreet is simply beneath her dignity.

traits.locale_text: Algunos dirían que es una insensatez gastarse una fortuna en un mero implante de cuello. Jae Heydari respondería que ninguna princesa de Efreet que se precie se dignaría a llevar un implante de cuello del montón.

languages.text: たかが首のインプラントに大金を費やすのは愚かだと言う人もいるかもしれない。ジェイ・ヘイダリは、イフリートの王女でありながら、たかが首のインプラントをつけるのは彼女の品位に反すると反論するだろう。
languages.original_text: Some might say it is foolish to spend a fortune on a mere neck implant. Jae Heydari would counter that wearing a mere neck implant while being the Princess of Efreet is simply beneath her dignity.

languages.text: Bazıları, sırf bir boyun implantı için servet harcamayı aptalca bulabilir. Jae Heydari ise boynuna sıradan bir implant takmanın İfrit Prensesi asaletine yakışmayacağını belirterek buna karşı çıkar.
languages.original_text: Some might say it is foolish to spend a fortune on a mere neck implant. Jae Heydari would counter that wearing a mere neck implant while being the Princess of Efreet is simply beneath her dignity.
